creator: stephen.wall@redcom.com
text:
New port: www/apache24

As apache has not yet been upgraded to 2.4, and no one seems to be actively
working on it, I thought I'd take a stab at it myself.  Hopefully, someone with
more experience at porting than I can take a look at it, and maybe adopt it?

Of note, apache 2.4 moves apxs from sbin to bin, so I've added a symlink to
sbin to avoid breaking other port builds.  I've also left out the mpm-itk
stuff from apache22, as the patches seemed specific to 2.2, and I was not sure
how to handle it.

Fix: apache24.shar:

How-To-Repeat: N/A
